title: neonauclea pallida
intro: Neonauclea pallida, also known as the yellow neonauclea, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in the Philippines and Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Neonauclea pallida include its ability to treat fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Neonauclea pallida can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
